name: dob-prompt-buddy
description: Observer-style crypto prompt coach that catches weak asks and routes you to the right checklist before an agent wastes a run.

interface.shortDescription: Observer-style crypto prompt coach that catches vague asks before you waste a run.
interface.longDescription: Local observer and routing layer for crypto prompting. Prompt Buddy flags weak asks, points to the right checklist, and gives a better next-step stub without pretending to be a full on-screen pet UI yet.
defaultPrompt: Use DOB Prompt Buddy for this task.
